The 'JACKED AND COKE' neon sign glows prominently ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched cyberpunk district, transitioning from a narrow sidewalk into a wide, bustling intersection. It begins by trailing a pedestrian in a white shirt along a wet pavement illuminated by glowing signs, passing black and yellow bollards as a black SUV drives by. As the camera approaches an intersection, the perspective shifts past a parked white sports car and a pedestrian in red and yellow attire, while the prominent JACKED AND COKE sign slides out of view. The scene then expands as the camera crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk under the gaze of traffic signals, bringing a yellow building with a BRAINdance sign into focus. Finally, the movement continues along the opposite sidewalk, passing atmospheric steam vents and a metallic planter before heading toward an overhead pedestrian walkway beneath a canopy of dense futuristic signage.
